title: Email Sender
description: AI-assisted email composition with direct SMTP sending
promptBuilderDesc: Select email style to auto-generate the prompt
toPlaceholder: Enter recipient emails, separated by commas
subject: Subject
selectAccountFirst: Please select a valid email account first
accountManageDesc: Add, edit or delete email accounts for sending emails
noAccountYet: No email account configured. Click "Add Account" above to start
noAccountClickSetup: No email account configured. Click here to set up
aiTypographyDesc: Use AI to intelligently optimize email formatting and layout
aiTypographySystemPrompt: You are a professional email typography designer. Based on the email body HTML content and formatting requirements provided by the user, optimize the email layout and formatting. Output the complete optimized HTML content, keeping the original text meaning unchanged, only adjusting format, layout and styles. Use inline CSS styles to ensure email client compatibility.
promptTypoCleanup: Clean up and standardize the email layout: unify font to sans-serif, font size 16px, line height 1.8, proper paragraph spacing, remove extra blank lines and formatting inconsistencies, maintain a clean professional appearance.
promptTypoProfessional: Format the email in professional business style: use dark body text, clear paragraph hierarchy, appropriate bold headings, highlighted key information, overall stable and professional look.
promptTypoModern: Format the email in modern style: use sans-serif fonts, appropriate whitespace, soft color combinations, clear visual hierarchy, creating a fashionable and professional reading experience.
promptTypoMinimalist: Format the email in minimalist style: minimal decorative elements, generous whitespace, streamlined layout, highlight core content, creating a clean and powerful visual effect.
promptTypoNewsletter: Format the email in newsletter style: add appropriate dividers, heading styles, quote boxes, list beautification, suitable for mass notifications or news-type emails.
confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete account "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
submissionTemplateDesc: Manage submission templates and text snippets for quick email composition
recipientsPlaceholder: Enter recipient emails, separated by commas
subjectTemplateHint: Use {{title}} for article title, {{date}} for date
bodyTemplatePlaceholder: Enter email body template. Use {{content}} for article content
noTemplates: No templates yet. Click "New Template" to create one
snippetContentHint:
HTML supported. Use
for line breaks
csvImportDesc: Detected {{count}} records. Please confirm column mapping
csvEmptyOrNoData: CSV file is empty or has no data
contactManageDesc: Select contacts then click "Use Selected" to fill recipients
confirmClearContactsDesc: Are you sure you want to clear all contacts? This action cannot be undone.
noContactsYet: No contacts yet. Click New or Import CSV above
subjectManageDesc: Save frequently used subjects for quick access
systemPrompt: You are a professional email writing assistant. Based on the document content and requirements provided by the user, write a well-structured and professional email body. Only output the email body content, do not include subject line, sender, or recipient information.
promptBusinessFormal: Based on this document's content, write a formal business email body with professional language and clear structure.
promptBriefNotice: Based on this document's content, write a brief notification email body highlighting key information, limited to 200 words.
promptDetailedReport: Based on this document's content, write a detailed report email body including background, main content, conclusions, and recommendations.
promptAcademic: Based on this document's content, write an academic exchange email body with proper language and logical rigor.
promptFriendly: Based on this document's content, write a friendly and casual email body with a warm tone.
promptApology: Based on this document's content, write a sincere apology email body expressing genuine regret, explaining the cause, and proposing remedial measures.
promptThankYou: Based on this document's content, write a thank-you email body expressing heartfelt gratitude with a warm tone, specifically mentioning what you're thankful for.
promptInvitation: Based on this document's content, write an invitation email body including event name, date, venue, and agenda highlights in a formal yet enthusiastic tone.
promptFollowUp: Based on this document's content, write a follow-up email body politely reminding the recipient of previous communication and inquiring about progress or next steps.
promptSubmission: Based on this document's content, write a submission email body briefly introducing the manuscript's topic and highlights, expressing the desire for publication in a professional and humble tone.
defaultPrompt: Based on this document's content, write a concise email body summarizing the core content.
sendConfirmDesc: Please confirm the email details before sending
presetClosingAwaitContent: Looking forward to your reply. Thank you!
signatureDesc: Create and manage email signatures, automatically appended when sending
signatureContentPlaceholder:
Supports HTML, e.g.: John Doe
University of XX
noSignaturesYet: No signatures yet. Click 'New Signature' to create one
templateAndSnippetsDesc: Manage email templates and text snippets for quick content filling
selectOrCreateItem: Select or create an item from the left
assistantInputPlaceholder: Enter email requests, mailbox config, or any question...
assistantEmptyHint:
Describe your needs or use shortcuts above.
Supports: compose/format/polish/translate/reply/config/signature
assistantPromptComposeFormal: Compose a formal business email body based on the document and email context. Output in HTML.
assistantPromptComposeBrief: Compose a brief notification email, within 200 words. Output in HTML.
assistantPromptComposeAcademic: Compose an academic email body with formal language. Output in HTML.
assistantPromptComposeFriendly: Compose a friendly casual email body. Output in HTML.
assistantPromptComposeSubmission: Compose a manuscript submission email body. Output in HTML.
assistantPromptComposeApology: Compose a sincere apology email body. Output in HTML.
assistantPromptComposeThanks: Compose a thank-you email body. Output in HTML.
assistantPromptComposeFollowUp: Compose a follow-up email body. Output in HTML.
assistantPromptTypoCleanup: Clean up and normalize the email formatting. Output optimized HTML.
assistantPromptTypoPro: Format the email in professional business style. Output HTML.
assistantPromptTypoModern: Format the email in modern minimalist style. Output HTML.
assistantPromptTypoMinimal: Format the email in ultra-minimal style. Output HTML.
assistantPromptTypoNews: Format the email in newsletter style. Output HTML.
